creator: jkim@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tracked it down and confirmed it is not OpenOffice.org's bug.  
Basically it goes like this: OOo -> GTK+ -> Cairo -> libX11. :-(
Luckily these issues are already fixed in the latest ports.  So, 
update your x11/libX11 and graphics/cairo and try again.  It should 
fix the issue.

Jung-uk Kim
